name: grok-faf-mcp
description: The MCP Grok asked for, on a URL — this is it. Persistent project context for xAI/Grok via the IANA-registered .faf format: runtime re-grounding (refresh_faf/fafm/blend), souls/memory (.fafm), the drift orchestration substrate, and LAZY-RAG retrieval with cache. 12 core tools (extended set behind FAF_TOOLS=all), 533 tests.
author: Wolfe-Jam
